privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated 10MB FAT32 disk images constructed via setup scripts. The target case name ('Evidence_Audit_2024'), case number ('IA-001'), log file path ('/home/ga/evidence/Chain_of_Custody_Log.txt'), and expected report output path ('/home/ga/Reports/integrity_audit.txt') explicitly match the prompt instructions, setup scripts, and the evaluation scripts.
